sections.paragraph: (“a part assigned”), with ה local תִּמְנָתָה [Timnab, Timnath], pr.n. of an ancient town of the Canaanites ( Gen 38:12), first given to the tribe of Judah ( Jos 15:10, 57 Jos 15:57), then to the Danites ( Jos 19:43), which was however long subject to the Philistines ( Jud. 14:1 2Ch 28:18 compare Jos. Arch. v. 8, § 5); Gent. תִּמְנִי Jud. 15:6 .
